entities.name: #engagement:responsive
entities.context: Quick replies indicating fast responders and high engagement

entities.name: #engagement:slow
entities.context: Slow responses indicating low engagement requiring patience

entities.name: #engagement:needs_followup
entities.context: Indicates that V is waiting on a response after sending the last message

entities.name: #engagement:waiting_on_us
entities.context: Indicates V needs to respond after the other party sent the last message
